nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner requiring human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I am collaborating. I am not at the point where I can rely fully on AI so I double check the work.

nodes.label: AI effectiveness in text-based tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I am extremely satisfied with letter writing and idea generation/ brainstorming. I am frequently frustrated with attempts to make graphics, flyers, visuals, etc.

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: My audit mind needs to be comfortable with the accuracy so I need assurances before I can let go and rely more heavily on AI.

nodes.label: Generational openness to AI
nodes.grounding_span: It surprises me how fast people my generation have fallen behind with AI, and all their missed opportunities, distrust, and fear.

nodes.label: Responsible AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I am very interested in using AI responsibly.

nodes.label: Professional accountability and quality
nodes.grounding_span: I am responsible for the output so I need to confirm everything.

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: This has saved me time and improved / enhanced quality of my work.

nodes.label: Focus on higher-level work
nodes.grounding_span: I can focus my attention on higher level things.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for text tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I am extremely satisfied with letter writing and idea generation/ brainstorming.

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for visual tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I am frequently frustrated with attempts to make graphics, flyers, visuals, etc.

nodes.label: Cautious optimism toward future AI reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I welcome the time when it is actually good enough to be more heavily relied upon, but my audit mind needs to be comfortable with the accuracy.

nodes.label: Surprise at colleagues' lack of AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: I am shocked that most colleagues do not embrace AI.

nodes.label: Audit-minded verification — systematic double-checking
nodes.grounding_span: My audit mind needs to be comfortable with the accuracy so I need assurances before I can let go and rely more heavily on AI.

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — back-and-forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I am collaborating. I am not at the point where I can rely fully on AI so I double check the work.
